hero.headline: Madison Arndt
body: Hey, I’m Madison.
I build systems, tools, and projects that are meant to actually work long term, not just once. I like things that are modular, flexible, and can grow without turning into a mess.

Outside of that, I spend a lot of time outdoors hiking, biking, kayaking, or just getting out when I can. I also run a free outdoor exercise group, so staying active and helping people stay consistent is a big part of my life.

sections.title: About Me
body: My brain works very logically. I naturally think in systems, patterns, and how things connect, almost like how a computer processes things.
I’m a mix of planner and builder. I like having structure, but I adjust as I go instead of forcing something that doesn’t fit. If something can be improved, I’ll probably end up reworking it.
I lean toward solving problems however makes the most sense, whether that’s systems, automation, hardware, or something experimental. The end result matters more than the method.
Socially, I’m Ambivert. I can be introverted or extroverted depending on the people and environment.

sections.title: Quick Facts
body: Scorpio (right on the edge, mix of both sides)
Spiritual, but I question things and don’t follow blindly
Believe in God, energy, and that there’s more going on than we fully understand
Logical thinker with an open mind

sections.title: Hobbies & Interests
body: Coding and building projects or business ideas
Gaming (PC, some mobile, tabletop)
DnD and strategy/world-building
3D printing
Outdoors: hiking, biking, kayaking, being outside
Creative phases: drawing, painting, jewelry making, design work, stain Glass
Listening to music from around the world
Writing music and Playing guitar

sections.title: Personality
body: Logical, but not closed-minded
Prefers flexible structure over rigid systems
Gets bored once something is fully solved
Always building, improving, or reworking something
Social energy depends on the situation
Strong loyalty, even when I probably shouldn’t

sections.title: What I Value
body: Honesty and people who think for themselves
Clear direction and knowing what you want
Actions over words
Having space to breathe, not everything rushed or forced

sections.title: Morals & Values
body: I don’t take things at face value just because someone says it’s true. Truth is something people need to think through and figure out for themselves. Context matters.
I judge more on actions and results than intentions. What you do matters more than what you say you meant.
Responsibility depends on the situation. If something needs to be handled, I’ll step in, but I don’t tolerate people who avoid pulling their weight.
In relationships, I care more about the person than labels. Time, personality, loyalty, and freedom matter more than trying to fit into a predefined structure.

sections.title: I Don’t Tolerate
body: I will burn a bridge if
- someone tries to control me
- someone lies to me
- I’m consistently not listened to
- someone refuses to think for themselves and blindly follows others
- someone avoids responsibility and expects others to carry them
- someone has a constant victim mentality

sections.title: Extras
body: Working toward building a life where I control my own time
Random fact: I was in the newspaper at age 9
